Mount Garibaldi, British Columbia


Prominence: 855 m, 2805 ft

Elevation: 2675 meters, 8776 feet


True Isolation: 10.9 km, 6.78 mi
Peak TypeVolcano
Latitude/Longitude (WGS84)49.850562, -123.004672 (Dec Deg)
49° 51' 2'' N, 123° 0' 17'' W (DMS)
499664 E, 5522016 N, Zone 10 (UTM)
Map SourceBC Basemap (1:20,000) - Main Source
Natural Resources Canada (1:50,000)
    Sheet: Cheakamus River (92 G/14)
NationCanada
State/ProvinceBritish Columbia
County/Second Level RegionFraser Valley
Squamish-Lillooet

On the summit with (left to right) Austin Smith, Josh Lewis, Mark Smith, Edward Earl, Duane Gilliland, and Craig Willis. Photo by Adam Walker. We had an incredible trip! (2015-05-31). Photo by Austin D. Smith.

Mount Garibaldi from north (2015-03-07). Photo by Weiwei Yin.
Click here for larger-size photo.



Garibaldi looms large over the rim of the Opal Cone (2021-08-15). Photo by Isaac Borrego.

Climbing Mount Garibaldi (2025-04-19). Photo by Tim Wostradowski.
Click here for larger-size photo.



A Photo from the Top (2025-04-19). Photo by Tim Wostradowski.
Click here for larger-size photo.

Mt Garibaldi - Atwell Peak seen from summit (2026-04-26). Photo by Keith Xu.
Click here for larger-size photo.



Mt Garibaldi - standard ascend route. Note the bergshrund (2026-04-26). Photo by Keith Xu.
Click here for larger-size photo.

The snow bridge over the bergschrund at the top of the Warren Glacier as of 9 May 2026 (2026-05-09). Photo by Sam Beaumont.
